world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: World of Darkness / Vampire: The Masquerade inspired gothic-punk horror atlas for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant gothic-punk continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago under a blood moon, vampire clan domains, Elysium masquerade locations, haunted cemeteries, sewer warrens, cathedral spires, fog-filled midnight parks, ruined havens, occult islands, Anarch ports, Camarilla courts and Sabbat-haunted outer isles.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated gothic vampire atlas, noir atmosphere, dark parchment, silver ink, deep crimson accents, fog-veiled coasts, ornate gothic cartography, political horror mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include tiny haunted islets, cemetery islands, reef belts, large city islands, crescent island chains, ruined abbey rocks and misty havens; include black compass rose, ornate gothic border, domain boundary shading, cemetery icons, Elysium symbols and hidden sewer routes without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, dark lagoons, reefs, wreck fields, atolls and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, deltas, foggy estuaries, capes, cliff coasts and fragmented rocks; show gothic megacities, old forests, moors, wetlands, mountains, snowfields, plague-dark farmlands and haunted harbors.
Avoid: uniform island grid, bright heroic fantasy, simple round islands, modern tourist map, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
